title: spiraea hypericifolia var. acuta
intro: Spiraea hypericifolia var. acuta, also known as the upright meadowsweet or sharp-leaved meadowsweet, is a plant species in the rose family (Rosaceae) with showy white flowers and sharp-toothed leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be used to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Spiraea hypericifolia var. acuta include its ability to calm the nervous system, relieve menstrual cramps, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the dried flowers and leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
